name: example_cast_library
notes: Project-specific cast/source registry. Keep raw images local or private unless intentionally licensed for this repo.

default_generation_policy.voiceover: external TTS when exact narration matters
default_generation_policy.subtitles: post-production overlays when exact text matters
default_generation_policy.reference_policy: Use one primary start image per Seedance clip if the endpoint accepts only one start image.

cast.use_scope: internal draft or approved project use
cast.prompt_identity: adult Japanese woman traveler guide, cream travel jacket, smartphone Vlog style
cast.notes: Primary guide reference for 9:16 TikTok story scenes.

cast.use_scope: internal draft or approved project use
cast.prompt_identity: adult Japanese male traveler guide, natural dark hair, handheld Vlog style
cast.notes: Use generated or rights-cleared male actor references. Do not default to the removed blond male guide.
Rights-sensitive source. Do not use for public/commercial output until rights are confirmed.
